description: CompositionPink and light grey striped polo neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed collar, buttoned chest placket, and embroidered brand logo on the left sleeve FittingRegular Wash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soakingLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroidery Warm up and enjoy healthy sporting in style with this puma polo neck t-shirt. Made of pure cotton fabric, you are sure to stay fresh and comfortable all day, while the Jumping cat logo enhances your fashion statement. Team this T-shirt with sportswear when on a fitness drive, and with jeans and sports shoes for a cool, casual look.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
